The Wedding of

Rohit & Nidhi

Eighth of December, 2024  ·  Jaipur, India
Their Story

Every love story is beautiful — but this one is ours.

Chapter OnePre-Wedding

Where Forever Began

Before the vows, before the lights — there was a quiet beginning. A glance that lingered a little too long, and a promise neither of them spoke aloud.

❦
First light

Two people, one road ahead — and all the time in the world.

Chapter TwoTilak

The First Blessing

A mark of saffron, a prayer whispered by elders. The families came together and the celebrations had truly begun.

❦
Sacred beginnings

With folded hands and full hearts, the promise was set in motion.

Chapter ThreeHaldi

A Touch of Gold

Turmeric on their skin and laughter in the air — the home glowed gold with marigold, music and the warmth of everyone they love.

❦
Chapter FourMehndi

Henna & Whispers

Intricate vines drawn across her hands, his name hidden somewhere within. Hours of stories, secrets and song.

❦
Coloured in love

They say the deeper the henna, the deeper the love.

Chapter FiveSangeet

A Night of Music

A night that belonged to dance — every song a memory, every step a celebration of the road that brought them here.

❦
Chapter SixThe Wedding

The Sacred Vows

Seven steps. Seven promises. Around the holy fire, before everyone they love, Rohit and Nidhi chose one another — for this life and the next.

❦

“In a sea of people, my eyes will always search for you.”

Bound forever

Two souls, one journey — sealed in fire and flowers.

Chapter SevenReception

Forever Begins

And then — the lights, the dancing, the first night of forever. A celebration of everything still to come.

❦
The first dance

The party that announced the start of always.

And so, hand in hand, their forever began.
